name: かぞえ飯
short_description: Have you ever wondered how many grains of rice are in your bowl when you are eating white rice? This game is a very simple game in which all you have to do is count the rice grains in the bowl. You will never have to worry about how many grains of rice are in your bowl again.
detailed_description:
Have you ever wondered how many grains of rice are in your bowl when you are eating white rice?
This game is a very simple game in which all you have to do is count the rice grains in the bowl.
You will never have to worry about how many grains of rice are in your bowl again.

In normal mode, 2000~4000 grains of rice are randomly and automatically generated in the bowl.
The player must guess how many grains of rice are in the bowl between 2000~4000 grains to clear the game!

About the modes.
In addition to Normal Mode, there are also Easy Mode and Hard Mode.
The difference between these modes is simple: the number of rice grains is different.
Normal mode has 2000~4000 grains while easy mode has 500~1000 grains,
Easy mode has 500~1000 grains.
Hard mode has 4000~8000 grains.

About the game operation controls.
Mouse movement moves the chopsticks.
With the left mouse click, you can lower the chopsticks.
If you are not holding the rice with the chopsticks, you can hold the rice with the chopsticks by placing the chopsticks down on top of the rice.
If you are holding the rice, you can place the rice where the chopsticks are down.
　*The trick is to use the shadow as a guide to bring the chopsticks down where you want them.
